case_title: HARROLD, BILL et al VS EVENSON, J E IND/DBA JANE ELIZABETH EVENSON PHOTO.

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT EVENSON, J E IND/DBA JANE ELIZABETH EVENSON PHOTO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARROLD, BILL CHOU, LORI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVENSON, J E IND/DBA JANE ELIZABETH EVENSON PHOTO. $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $396.00, DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFFS WITH A 36 PAGE FLORENTINE WEDDING ALBUM AND ALL NEGATIVES AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HARROLD, BILL CHOU, LORI AS TO DEFENDANT EVENSON, J E IND/DBA JANE ELIZABETH EVENSON PHOTO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVENSON, J E IND/DBA JANE ELIZABETH EVENSON PHOTO.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT EVENSON, J E IND/DBA JANE ELIZABETH EVENSON PHOTO.
